description: You are the Redmine administrator for 'Orbital Aerospace'. Configure the Redmine instance to match the company's branding and localization standards by setting the application title to 'Orbital Operations' and the welcome text to 'Authorized Personnel Only. All activity is monitored.' Additionally, set the date format to 'YYYY-MM-DD' (ISO 8601), the time format to 'HH:mm' (24-hour), and the user display format to 'Lastname, Firstname'.

metadata.expected_welcome_text: Authorized Personnel Only. All activity is monitored.
